root.sql: SELECT vr_nsk_010_002000.membership_no, vr_nsk_010_002000.memname, vr_nsk_010_002000.operate_date, vr_nsk_010_002000.entry_id, vr_nsk_010_002000.loan_contract, vr_nsk_010_002000.balance, vr_nsk_010_002000.drop_status_last, vr_nsk_010_002000.drop_status_last_desc, vr_nsk_010_002000.drop_status, vr_nsk_010_002000.drop_status_desc, vr_nsk_010_002000.period_payment_old, vr_nsk_010_002000.period_payment_new, vr_nsk_010_002000.period_compomise FROM vr_nsk_010_002000 where operate_date between '!operate_date_1!' and '!operate_date_2!' /*WHERE*/
